title: weigela × fujisanensis var. versicolor
intro: Weigela × fujisanensis var. versicolor, also known as Japanese weigela, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Ericaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in East Asian medicine, where its leaves and roots are valued for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Weigela × fujisanensis var. versicolor include its potential to aid in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a diuretic to help reduce fluid retention. Weigela × fujisanensis var. versicolor is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, or used in traditional herbal remedies, highlighting its versatility in herbal medicine.
